name: the GCTP handoff names the two coupled, language-agnostic build flows (co-design + path tagging + agnosticism)
command: grep -q '§28.62/§28.67 co-design' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q '§28.63 development-path tagging' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q '§28.64 language/framework agnosticism' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && grep -q 'codesign-build.sh' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/docs/handoff-gctp-composite-engine.md" && echo handoff-two-flows 1>&2
